'''yalulu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:enbugging|enbugging]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-l-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:enbugging|enbugging]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| yalulu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yælilith|yælilith]] || [[word:yælilij|yælilij]] || [[word:yælilish|yælilish]] || [[word:yælili|yælili]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yalululuth|yalululuth]] || [[word:yalululuj|yalululuj]] || [[word:yalululush|yalululush]] || [[word:yalululu|yalululu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yaluluth|yaluluth]] || [[word:yaluluj|yaluluj]] || [[word:yalulush|yalulush]] || [[word:yalulu|yalulu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yalufluth|yalufluth]] || [[word:yalufluj|yalufluj]] || [[word:yaluflush|yaluflush]] || [[word:yalufluf|yalufluf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yaluluthu|yaluluthu]] || [[word:yaluluju|yaluluju]] || [[word:yalulushu|yalulushu]] || [[word:yaluluku|yaluluku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yaluluth|yaluluth]] || [[word:yaluluj|yaluluj]] || [[word:yalulush|yalulush]] || [[word:yalulu|yalulu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yaluluthul|yaluluthul]] || [[word:yalulujul|yalulujul]] || [[word:yalulushul|yalulushul]] || [[word:yalulukul|yalulukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yaluluthuthu|yaluluthuthu]] || [[word:yalulujuju|yalulujuju]] || [[word:yalulushushu|yalulushushu]] || [[word:yaluluku|yaluluku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yaluluthun|yaluluthun]] || [[word:yalulujun|yalulujun]] || [[word:yalulushun|yalulushun]] || [[word:yalulukun|yalulukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yaluluthuoro|yaluluthuoro]] || [[word:yalulujuoro|yalulujuoro]] || [[word:yalulushuoro|yalulushuoro]] || [[word:yalulukuoro|yalulukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
